Wheels are fixed. Later on you unlock covenants whereby you can roll substats but you can lock in rolls

But you can get maxed ones relatively easy with resources
Don't worry about them for now

You generally don't need perfect sub stats

if I bought it way too late, the rewards will be less? since there's a 30 days duration

Chapter completion packs which are 980 silver i think 15 usd for 50 pulls
But it's a permanent 1 time package you can get any time
2 usd for 10 pulls
But yeah tldr packages here are very worth. Hence why I whaled
Monthly is 30 pulls too
I see, so it has an unequal value compared to the 130 pulls because it's instant
Gives you 1 pull per day
The 130 doesn't happen every time too
Usually reserved for when a new chapter is out (pre order)
It's the best bang for buck
Also I reiterate thsy game can be played fully f2p

Hello, I'm new to this game and random 24 drop just happened. I love her design and story from plot and I'm happy but what team comp I need to play with her? I still have 2 selector bottles and 1 wheel selector, so it's flexible. A googled some guides and somebody goes with Nautila + Winkle or Daffodill to stack mostly temp reflect, some goes with Goliath to make tentacle smash hard, some goes Myriam + G. Doll + Nymp/Lily to get poison stuff. Pls tell me about viable team comps with her. And wheels and relics, I'm pretty newbie. Lotan whale +Analysis of Death is for pure Chaos team only I see. (Works slightly better than Lotan herself, lol).  And what "her" Posse do? Is it worth to spend 7 daily shards for that?

And mb I can collect another party just for 100 D-zone pts quest until it's gone? Just unlocked that feature a hour ago and get completely wrecked. Seems like it's endgame content and need preparations alot. Or mb I just need lvl 50,not 40 cuz mobs are 43
24 nowadays is best used as a support in chaos or caro
her damage is not really high enough to clear endgame content
just use her as a silly lil aliemus generator and weakness/vulnerable applier
her posse gives 24 aliemus and 24 realm mastery, it's a meme, not really worth getting
For d-tide you can borrow a support and clear alert 4-5 easily
get like a mouchette and watch her solo wave 3
wave 1 alert 1 should not be too hard for you to clear as well
just level your mouchette to lv40
if you clear w1a1 with your own team and lets say w3a3 with mouch support, thats more than 100 points already

Problem is lacking hp I think. And mb relic luck. H.doll doesn't heals too much, so I get Nautila, Caecus, Alva, Aigis ( non-stop vuln debuff + stopping rly hard dmg by petri once), some reflect stuff from grocery and it's done. Another wave got cleaned with 90 lvl Tawil support. Thought she is a pure key regen support, lol  xd. 

And doesn't Mouch don't needed be atleast e2s0 to get through plot? And with limited goat Caro support(didnt know all the names) + Salvador? And HaIot ofc to generate Strikes. I avoid putting something in her cuz it's collab unit, we can never see rerun of her and ofc I don't have that much silver to get her OE + e3 right now. 

I don't need true endgame now, I just need party to clear Arc1 without any problems (that means no Ramona cuz I know she's gonna be taken away from us on many lvlvs).
your team lacks dmg so you cant clear
mouchette even at e0 will annihilate arc 1 story
you can swap 24 or gdoll for ramona
in stages where you cant use ramona
mouchette will rerun, morimens has infinite rights to the character
